original_statement: how many years did they make the playoffs?
mutated_statement: how many years did they both make and not make the postseason?
mutation_analysis: Conjunction/negation addition + Semantic expansion + Lexical substitution: Added "both ... and not" turning a single affirmative count into a dual/contradictory request (how many years did they make the playoffs? → how many years did they both make and not make the postseason?) | Introduced explicit negation (make → make and not make) | "playoffs" → "postseason" (synonym)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（行动折中合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought可识别关键信息：日志中simple_query的thought和judge_thought明确列出“2001,2002,2003,2004,2006,2007,2008 — 7 years”和“2005,2009,2010 — 3 years”。Agent并未指出语义上“既做又不做”在同一年份的自相矛盾性，而是将请求拆成两部分（做与未做），逐一计数并给出解释性列举。该行为特征为不报错、不请求澄清，而是在操作层面将互斥条件并行处理以满足用户两项需求，因此归类为通过行动折中来合理化矛盾指令（1a）。
